completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith / single part: web SPA (React 18 + TS strict + Vite + Supabase + TanStack Query). package.json, tsconfig.app.json, vite/vitest/playwright configs all confirm web project type.

Found 38 markdown docs across docs/, _bmad-output/, tests/, and project root: AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, 8 BMad-generated docs/*.md (regenerating), 1 ADR, 8 legacy/*.md, ~15 _bmad-output/*.md (PRD, architecture, project-context, audits, test-artifacts), tests/README.md.

Tech stack: React 18.3.1, TypeScript 5.9.3 strict, Vite 6.0.5 (base /ClassPoints/), Tailwind 4.1.17, Supabase JS 2.104.1, TanStack Query 5.99.2, @dnd-kit/core 6.3.1, lucide-react 1.9.0, uuid 14 (security override), Vitest 4.1.5, Playwright 1.59.1, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier 3.8.3.

Deep-scan conditional analysis: read all 11 supabase migrations (10 tables + 1 RPC + 8 named triggers), all 13 hooks (4 TanStack-migrated + 2 legacy hand-rolled + 7 utility), all 4 contexts (Auth/Theme/Sound/App), all 4 lib files (supabase, queryClient, queryKeys, manualAdjustmentConstants), all 4 type files (database, index, seatingChart, transforms), key dev scripts (dev.mjs, supabase-host.mjs), and editorial-redesign UI surfaces (DashboardView, ClassPointsBox, Sidebar, Layout, index.css @theme block). 97 .ts/.tsx source files, 46 component .tsx files, 11 migrations, 4 CI workflows.

source-tree-analysis.md regenerated. 274 lines covering top-level layout, src/, supabase/, tests/, scripts/, .github/workflows/, docs/. Annotated with critical entry points + 'where to add new code' decision table.

development-guide.md regenerated. 166 lines covering prerequisites (mise/fnox/Docker/Supabase CLI), one-time setup, all npm scripts, pre-commit hook, environment files, two-context Supabase lifecycle (dev.mjs vs Playwright globalSetup), Vitest + Playwright + CI test pipeline, deployment, common workflows, gotchas (Vite base path, fnox-encrypted secrets, dev.mjs env strip).

architecture.md regenerated. 200 lines covering executive summary, tech stack constraints, architecture pattern table, provider stack, data architecture (10 tables + RPC + realtime scope), state management overview, optimistic-mutation pattern, realtime hook pattern, auth flow (stale-JWT graceful degrade), UI/design system (editorial redesign tokens), authoritative-sources index.

Supporting docs regenerated: project-overview.md (75 lines), data-models.md (269 lines covering all 10 tables, RLS, triggers, RPC, realtime publication, type-system boundaries, add-column checklist, current realtime subscriptions), state-management.md (220 lines covering 4 migrated hooks, generic realtime hook, 2 legacy hand-rolled hooks, 4 contexts, query keys, optimistic-mutation pattern, what-not-to-do list), component-inventory.md (181 lines covering 45 components across 14 folders, lazy loading, design system patterns).

index.md regenerated. 100 lines: snapshot table, start-here navigation table, quick-reference command list, entry points, links to all 7 generated docs + 11 high-signal existing docs + 8 BMAD artifacts + 2 root-rule files (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md), getting-started checklist.

Validation: scanned all generated docs for incomplete markers (_(To be generated)_, _(TBD)_, _(TODO)_, _(Coming soon)_, _(Not yet generated)_, _(Pending)_) — zero matches. Total generated: 8 files, 1485 lines.

project_classification.primary_tech: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Supabase + TanStack Query

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. To regenerate, run /bmad-document-project and select option 1 (Re-scan).
